label: plain_text
text:
7.
A solid consisting of a right circular cone of height 120 cm and radius
60 cm standing on
a hemisphere of radius
 60 cm is placed
 upright in a right circular cylinder full of 
water
such that it touches the bottom. Find the volume of water left in the cylinder, if the radius
of the cylinder is 60 cm and its height is 180 cm.
